test_cases.title: Search Functionality
steps: Enter a valid search query in the search bar
Verify the search results are displayed
test_cases.expected: Search results are displayed with relevant information

test_cases.title: Invalid Search Query
steps: Enter an invalid search query in the search bar
Verify an error message is displayed
test_cases.expected: An error message is displayed indicating the search query is invalid

test_cases.title: Login Functionality
test_cases.expected: The user is logged in successfully

test_cases.title: Invalid Login Credentials
test_cases.expected: An error message is displayed indicating the login credentials are invalid

test_cases.title: Calculator Functionality
test_cases.expected: The calculator displays the correct result

test_cases.title: Accessibility Check
steps: Use a screen reader to navigate the website
test_cases.expected: All elements are accessible using a screen reader

test_cases.title: SQL Injection Test
steps: Enter a SQL injection string in the login form
test_cases.expected: The website prevents the SQL injection attack and displays an error message

test_cases.title: Password Reset Functionality
test_cases.expected: A password reset email is sent to the user

test_cases.title: Navigation and Routing
steps: Verify the correct pages are displayed
test_cases.expected: The correct pages are displayed for each navigation link

test_cases.title: Error Handling
steps: Verify an error message is displayed
test_cases.expected: An error message is displayed indicating the network error

test_cases.title: Form Validation
steps: Enter invalid input values in a form
test_cases.expected: Error messages are displayed indicating the invalid input values

test_cases.title: Data Table Sorting
steps: Click on different column headers in a data table
Verify the data is sorted correctly
test_cases.expected: The data is sorted correctly for each column

test_cases.title: Pagination Functionality
steps: Verify the correct data is displayed
test_cases.expected: The correct data is displayed for each pagination link
